commands.review_summary:
The PR adds an early `onEarlyText` path so voice-call TTS can start from the first embedded-agent block reply before post-turn compaction settles.

PR surface: Source +42, Tests +123. Total +165 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level reproduction is high confidence: current main awaits the full embedded-agent result before speaking, while the embedded runner exposes block replies before compaction waits. I did not run a live Twilio/VoIP roundtrip in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human review is needed because the PR is conflicting and still lacks contributor real-behavior proof from the voice-call path.

target.title: fix(voice-call): deliver early TTS via onEarlyText before compaction wait
target.body:
## Root Cause

When `generateVoiceResponse()` calls `agentRuntime.runEmbeddedAgent()`, the embedded runner flushes block replies before compaction but `generateVoiceResponse()` still awaits the full `runEmbeddedAgent()` promise (which includes post-turn compaction) before extracting text. The webhook then calls `manager.speak()` only after `generateVoiceResponse()` resolves. This means callers hear silence until compaction finishes — often several seconds after the agent produces its first block reply.

## Summary

This PR delivers the first block reply's spoken text to TTS immediately via a new `onEarlyText` callback, without waiting for the embedded run to finish post-turn compaction:

- **`response-generator.ts`**: Adds `onEarlyText?: (text: string) => Promise<void>` to `VoiceResponseParams`. In the `onBlockReply` handler, extracts usable spoken text from the first block reply payload and fires `onEarlyText` immediately (fire-and-forget). Adds `earlyTextSpoken` flag to `VoiceResponseResult` so the caller can skip a duplicate post-run `speak()`.
- **`webhook.ts`**: Passes `onEarlyText` that calls `this.manager.speak(callId, text)` as soon as the first block reply arrives. Falls back to the post-run speak only when `earlyTextSpoken` is false (no block reply arrived).
- **`response-generator.test.ts`**: Adds a regression test that proves `onEarlyText` fires before a deliberately deferred `runEmbeddedAgent` settles, and a fallback test for when no block reply arrives.

Fixes #79521

## Verification

- `pnpm test extensions/voice-call` — 50 test files, 462 tests passed (including 2 new regression tests)
- `pnpm test extensions/voice-call/src/response-generator.test.ts` — 13/13 tests passed
- `pnpm build` — successful
- `pnpm check:test-types` — clean
- `pnpm oxlint --quiet extensions/voice-call/` — clean
- `pnpm oxfmt --check extensions/voice-call/` — clean

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: Voice call callers hear silence until post-turn compaction completes because `generateVoiceResponse()` waits for the full `runEmbeddedAgent()` promise before extracting text and calling `manager.speak()`.

Real environment tested: Linux (Node 22), branch `fix/issue-79521-voice-call-block-reply`, commit `f8369f0b42`

Exact steps or command run after this patch:

```bash
pnpm test extensions/voice-call
pnpm test extensions/voice-call/src/response-generator.test.ts
pnpm build
pnpm check:test-types
pnpm oxlint --quiet extensions/voice-call/src/
pnpm oxfmt --check extensions/voice-call/src/
```

Evidence after fix:

```console
$ pnpm test extensions/voice-call

Test Files  50 passed (50)
     Tests  462 passed (462)
      Time  62.08s

$ pnpm test extensions/voice-call/src/response-generator.test.ts

Test Files  1 passed (1)
     Tests  13 passed (13)
  ✓ generates voice responses
    ✓ suppresses reasoning payloads and reads structured spoken output
    ✓ prefers fresh block reply spoken output over stale completed payloads
    ✓ extracts spoken text from fenced JSON
    ✓ returns silence for an explicit empty spoken contract response
    ✓ strips leading planning text when model returns plain text
    ✓ keeps plain conversational output when no JSON contract is followed
    ✓ pins the voice session to responseModel before running the embedded agent
    ✓ uses the persisted per-call session key for classic responses
    ✓ uses the main agent workspace when voice config omits agentId
    ✓ uses the configured voice response agent workspace
    ✓ delivers early TTS via onEarlyText before the embedded run settles    ← NEW
    ✓ returns earlyTextSpoken false when no block reply arrived             ← NEW
    ✓ passes the routed voice agent explicit tool allowlist to the embedded run

$ pnpm build
...Tasks: 80 successful, 80 total

$ pnpm check:test-types — clean
$ pnpm oxlint --quiet — no errors in changed files
$ pnpm oxfmt --check — clean
```

Observed result after fix: The `onEarlyText` callback fires from within `onBlockReply` before `runEmbeddedAgent` resolves. The webhook's `manager.speak()` is called immediately with the first block reply's text, eliminating the compaction-induced silence. The regression test proves this by holding `runEmbeddedAgent` unsettled while verifying `onEarlyText` already invoked. When no block reply arrives, the existing fallback to `result.payloads` + post-run `speak()` still works.

What was not tested: No live Twilio/VoIP roundtrip was performed. The webhook's `onEarlyText`→`manager.speak()` path is unit-tested at the `response-generator` level but not through a real WebSocket/STT/TTS pipeline.
target.author: xialonglee
